title: cenchrus pumilus
intro: Cenchrus pumilus, also known as sandbur grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical Africa and the Indian Ocean region. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cenchrus pumilus include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Cenchrus pumilus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and effective medicinal plant.
